title: Racosperma cretatum
taxonomy: Racosperma cretatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to Australia and is also known as Acacia cretata. Racosperma cretatum is a member of the genus Racosperma, which is a group of flowering plants that are closely related to Acacia. The classification of Racosperma cretatum is subject to change as taxonomic research continues. The plant is often classified as a synonym of Acacia cretata.

In some cultures, the plant is believed to have antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound care.
